markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website migration plans.](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refresh efforts showing positive results: 3x increase in impressions for batch 1, 50% increase for batch 2](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Indexing remains a challenge: 48% of articles (50 out of 104) not yet indexed](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Plans to reduce blog from 350-400 articles to \~250 high-value SEO pages through strategic 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Website migration to Webflow planned for next week to potentially improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [New content strategy focusing on seasonal topics (e.g. holiday shopping) and user-generated content (UGC)](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh and Consolidation Strategy

  - [Identifying and consolidating similar articles to reduce overall count from 350-400 to \~250](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Example: Combining 9 web story-related articles into 4 comprehensive pieces](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Implementing 301 redirects for consolidated content](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Prateek to share list of proposed consolidations for team review](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Adding CTAs to refreshed articles; Akash to provide list of high-converting CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### SEO Performance Updates

  - [Content refreshes showing positive results:](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Batch 1 (5 articles): 50 daily impressions → 154 daily impressions (3x increase)](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Batch 2 (10 articles): 200 daily impressions → 300 daily impressions (50% increase)](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New articles: 3,800 total impressions, mostly from last week](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Clicks increased from 8-10 to 15 for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Indexing Challenges

  - [48% of articles (50 out of 104) not indexed](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Potential factors: tech issues, low-quality existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Team discussing multi-pronged approach: tech improvements, content quality, and page consolidation](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Content Quality and Uniqueness

  - [Example shared of in-depth, human-edited content on web stories](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Yi Jin raised concerns about AI detection rates (30-40% detected as AI)](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - Suggestions for improvement:
      - [Add clear sections for infographics, images, and workflow charts](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Focus on unique angles and comprehensive coverage of topics](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

### Website Migration to Webflow

  - [Jorge Leon working on basic Webflow setup, aiming for deployment next week](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Team expects significant SEO improvements post-migration based on experiences with other clients](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [Focus on seasonal content (e.g., holiday shopping season)](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Emphasis on user-generated content (UGC) and its impact on sales conversion](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Align content with company focus: live shopping, shoppable videos, and addressing specific customer problems](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share list of proposed article consolidations for team review](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Akash to provide list of high-converting CTAs for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Jorge to continue Webflow migration, aiming for deployment next week](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Team to create content around holiday shopping season and UGC, to be published in early October](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Yi Jin to share keyword research for seasonal and UGC content](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Prateek to incorporate seasonal and UGC topics into upcoming content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=2272.0)
  - [Team to review SEO performance post-Webflow migration before considering further page eliminations](https://fathom.video/share/xRx2CsV8XiYNxzXHzqf8HPzU2fWzAKXY?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
